texto: It seems too simplistic that just repeating a persuasive message should increase its effect, but that’s exactly what psychological research finds (again and again). Repetition is one of the easiest and most widespread methods of persuasion. In fact it’s so obvious that we sometimes forget how powerful it is.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jeremy Bean sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “It seems too simplistic that just repeating a persuasive message should increase its effect, but …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, alternative-facts, liar, útil em momentos de liar e lying.
